Project: Android app for item identification, eBay marketplace research, and listing creation.

Use Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and a ViewModel/state-driven UI.

Keep the code modular so camera, image recognition, marketplace search, OAuth, and listing publishing can be added independently.

Use placeholder implementations for external services until real API credentials and workflows are wired in.

Use free connector options only (free tier or open-source) for camera, image recognition, OAuth helpers, and marketplace integrations unless the user explicitly approves a paid option.

Prefer small, focused changes that preserve the existing app structure.

Update README.md when the app flow or setup steps change.
